name: Six-Minute Souffle
recipeInstructions:
1. Butter a 5-cup souffle dish or other baking dish.
2. Add eggs, heavy cream, parmesan cheese, mustard, salt, and pepper to a blender.
Blend until smooth, about 30 seconds.
3. Add shredded cheddar cheese; blend until smooth.
4. Add softened, cubed cream cheese, one cube at a time, blending until smooth.
5. Mix on high speed for 10-15 seconds.
6. Pour the mixture into the prepared dish.
7. Bake in a preheated oven at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 45 minutes, or until puffy and browned.
8. Serve immediately.
